examples: But we cannot relegate computer games to the cesspit of pop culture solely on the evidence of the current crop of games.

By a fluke of timing your special report appeared in the same week that Vince Cable called the City a "cesspit".
He was a little off mark: a cesspit can be cleaned out.
Mr Tucker said he was not aware of any Libor manipulation at the time, but now realised the Libor market was a "cesspit".
